title: The Broken Script: BLACKOUT
description: An extension of TBS, a slow burn mod that tries to make you feel like you're part of an ARG
body:
## READ THIS BEFORE YOU PLAY:
- THIS MOD HAS LOUD SOUNDS LIKE TBS!! BY DOWNLOADING  YOU ACKNOWLEDGE ANY HARM. DONT LIKE LOUD SOUNDS? DOWNLOAD [QUIET MODE RES PACK](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tbs-blackout-quiet-mode)
- THIS MOD HAS FLASHING LIGHTS WITH NO WAY TO DISABLE!!!!!
- YOU NEED TO FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS TO INSTALL THIS MOD CORRECTLY
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YAzqt2Y8_2g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- YOU ALSO NEED [CONFIGURED](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)
- PLAY THIS MOD ALONGSIDE [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) OR CERTAIN EVENTS WILL NOT WORK
- ALL CREDITS GO TO THE ORIGINAL TBS AND [Mark101](https://www.youtube.com/@unintelligible-synapse)
- THIS MOD CAN DELETE YOUR WORLD (disable in config)
- THIS MOD ISNT A VIRUS!! the most it can do is delete your world, open some pop ups/cmd and shake the game window, these are all toggable in the config
- This mod isn't canon or confirmed to be connected to TBS at all
- This mod is loud (disable with [resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tbs-blackout-quiet-mode))
- This mod can ban you from your world (disable in config)
- This mod can kick you from your world (disable in config)
- This mod can crash your game (disable in config)
- This mod won't destroy your buildings or create any files in your desktop yet
- If you encounter any bugs do not hesitate to tell me about it (I'm new to coding and modding Minecraft)
- Don't put some stupid ass "scary" faces on the entities

**For the people that actually wanna read the desc:**
# THE BROKEN SCRIPT: BLACKOUT 
![One out of the 4 backgrounds, made by Guilherme_legal!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ec36d315a136a96898b67e69fbb02a24fc5365f.png)
<u>**Just close your eyes, and wait.**</u>



> **What is it?**

TBS:B is an addon for [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script) which main purpose is to fill in the blanks of TBS lore while adding new events/entities for players that have played the original mod and experienced 100% of it.
Just like the original TBS, TBS:B will not force any entities into your face or make itself known very early into the game, instead events will happen as days go by and entities may spawn from time to time

(Total entities: 7  Total events: 62)

The addon is capable of deleting your world, kicking and banning you from your game as well as crashing your game, and more recently opening stuff outside of your game, all of these can be disabled in the config


> **I got banned from my world, how do I unban myself?**

Removing this mod from your mod folder may allow you to enter the world again, to avoid this next time turn off banning by _checking_ the "_No_ banning" box


> **I found a glitch/bug, what do I do/where do I report it?**

Report any glitches or bugs you may find in the comments, but preferably join the Discord server, go to the bug reporting channel and post it there (include a screenshot if possible). 


> **Who's Administration 2 and what does it mean if he joined my game?**

:)

Like BLACKOUT and would like to see teasers before release or want to give some feedback back? Join us over at our discord, we'll read everything you say!

https://discord.gg/V4KSuwdmQn


Curseforge link: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-broken-script-blackout](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-broken-script-blackout)

## Credits
- Some entities, sounds and lore - Mark101 and The Broken Script
  
All credits go to [TBS dev team](https://modrinth.com/organization/writers-of-the-script), if they want something from this mod to be changed/removed reach out to rand/bread9_9 in Discord
